"""Go library 'jobapi' -- generated by defn gen."""

load("@io_bazel_rules_go//go:def.bzl", "go_library", "go_test")

        "@com_github_go_chi_chi_v5//:chi",
        "@com_github_go_chi_chi_v5//middleware",
    ],
)
